description.es: Portfolio personal bilingüe y blog construido end-to-end. Frontend estático en **Astro 4 + TypeScript + Tailwind** con islands de **Preact** (formulario de contacto, admin SPA). Backend en **FastAPI + Supabase (Postgres + Storage)** con auth JWT y rate-limiting. i18n con shape JSONB `{es, en}` enforced en build, blog con markdown sanitizado, y dark/light mode con persistencia en `localStorage`.
description.en: Personal bilingual portfolio and blog built end-to-end. Static frontend in **Astro 4 + TypeScript + Tailwind** with **Preact** islands (contact form, admin SPA). Backend in **FastAPI + Supabase (Postgres + Storage)** with JWT auth and rate-limiting. i18n with JSONB `{es, en}` shape enforced at build, markdown-sanitized blog, and dark/light mode persisted in `localStorage`.
